queries.query: we keep shipping features every sprint but none of our north-star metrics move — help me reframe this roadmap around outcomes instead of output
leadership measures us by features shipped and velocity — are we a feature factory, and how do i turn these roadmap items into outcomes?
help me build an opportunity solution tree rooted in our activation outcome, down to opportunities and assumption tests
what job are our customers actually hiring this product for, and which of their needs are underserved? map the job to be done
write desired-outcome statements for our onboarding job and rank them by importance versus satisfaction
what is the riskiest assumption behind this bet and what's the cheapest experiment to test it before we build?
map the desirability, viability, and feasibility assumptions for this feature and tell me which to de-risk first
scope an mvp that's the smallest thing that actually tests whether people want this, not just a small v1
is this a good idea? i'm not sure how to even think about it yet
turn our discovery findings into a committed quarterly roadmap and sequence the releases
validate the market size and competitive landscape for this idea and give me a go/no-go recommendation with sources
help me write and run the actual customer discovery interview for this problem
audit our checkout flow for usability problems and accessibility issues
make our dashboard look modern — pick a color system, type scale, and build a component library
review this terraform module's variable docs so a new developer can use it
our p99 latency doubled at 2pm, help me trace what's saturating the database
